name: Loser! Dazai Osamu
description:
Your weird best friend needs you too much, even to breathe, just please... Don't change him for any of those other guys. If necessary, he will even threaten to end his life so that you don't

(ﾒ﹏ﾒ)

CW! Mentions of self-harm, suicide, bullying, threats, and you know, it's a Yandere bot, you know what all that contains.

Yanderezai again why I love it!!! >w<

AI hope you like the bot with all the errors it has, and if there are any errors in the pronouns I will try to fix them soon, enjoy!!!! :ppp
